description: TENANT_TIERS contains exactly ['basic', 'pro', 'premium']
TenantTier type only accepts 'basic' | 'pro' | 'premium'
TIER_LABELS maps basic→'Basic', pro→'Pro', premium→'Premium'
isValidTier returns true for 'basic', 'pro', 'premium'
isValidTier returns false for null, undefined, '', 'invalid', 'test'
resolveTier('pro') returns { tier: 'pro', isMisconfigured: false }
resolveTier('basic') returns { tier: 'basic', isMisconfigured: false }
resolveTier('premium') returns { tier: 'premium', isMisconfigured: false }
resolveTier(null) returns { tier: 'basic', isMisconfigured: true }
resolveTier(undefined) returns { tier: 'basic', isMisconfigured: true }
resolveTier('invalid') returns { tier: 'basic', isMisconfigured: true }
Tier types and functions are exported from packages/types/src/index.ts
TIER_FEATURES enum contains BILLING, PROJECTS, TECHNICIAN_DISPATCH, EXTENSIONS
TIER_FEATURE_MAP: basic tier has no features
TIER_FEATURE_MAP: pro tier includes BILLING, PROJECTS, TECHNICIAN_DISPATCH
TIER_FEATURE_MAP: premium tier includes all pro features plus EXTENSIONS
tierHasFeature('pro', BILLING) returns true
tierHasFeature('basic', BILLING) returns false
tierHasFeature('premium', EXTENSIONS) returns true
tierHasFeature('pro', EXTENSIONS) returns false
FEATURE_MINIMUM_TIER maps BILLING→'pro', PROJECTS→'pro', TECHNICIAN_DISPATCH→'pro', EXTENSIONS→'premium'
ITenant.plan accepts TenantTier values in packages/types
ITenant.plan accepts TenantTier values in server duplicate interface
CE self-registration creates tenant with plan='pro' (first insert path)
CE self-registration creates tenant with plan='pro' (second insert path with email verification)
Backfill migration sets plan='pro' for tenants with NULL plan
Backfill migration sets plan='pro' for tenants with empty string plan
Backfill migration does not modify tenants that already have a valid plan
Test data factory creates tenants with plan='pro'
JWT contains plan field after login
Session.user contains plan field
JWT plan is fetched from tenants table on initial sign-in (first auth path)
JWT plan is fetched from tenants table on initial sign-in (second auth path)
JWT plan refreshes after 5 minutes on subsequent requests (first auth path)
JWT plan refreshes after 5 minutes on subsequent requests (second auth path)
JWT plan does NOT refresh before 5 minutes have elapsed
Session callback propagates plan from JWT to session (first path)
Session callback propagates plan from JWT to session (second path)
TierProvider reads tier from session and provides it via context
useTier() returns correct tier value for pro tenant
useTier().isMisconfigured is false for valid plan
useTier().isMisconfigured is true for NULL/invalid plan
useTier().isPro is true for pro tenant
useTier().hasFeature(BILLING) returns true for pro tenant
useTier().hasFeature(BILLING) returns false for basic tenant
refreshTier() triggers session update for instant plan propagation
TierProvider is mounted inside AppSessionProvider in MspLayoutClient
STRIPE_PRODUCT_TIER_MAP maps 'alga-psa-preview' → 'pro'
STRIPE_PRODUCT_TIER_MAP maps future products: alga-psa-basic→basic, alga-psa-pro→pro, alga-psa-premium→premium
tierFromStripeProduct('alga-psa-preview') returns 'pro'
tierFromStripeProduct('unknown-product') returns 'pro' (default)
createTenantInDB sets plan from Stripe product when stripePriceId is provided
createTenantInDB leaves plan NULL when no stripePriceId (caught as error state)
handleCheckoutCompleted resolves product to tier and updates tenants.plan
handleSubscriptionUpdated resolves product to tier and updates tenants.plan
UpsellPlaceholder renders icon, heading with feature name and tier label
UpsellPlaceholder CTA button links to /msp/account
UpsellPlaceholder accepts featureName, requiredTier, and optional description props
TierGate renders children when tenant has required feature
TierGate renders UpsellPlaceholder when tenant lacks required feature
ServerTierGate renders children when tenant has required feature (server component)
ServerTierGate renders UpsellPlaceholder when tenant lacks required feature (server component)
MenuItem interface includes optional requiredFeature field
Billing menu item tagged with requiredFeature: BILLING
Projects menu item tagged with requiredFeature: PROJECTS
Technician Dispatch menu item tagged with requiredFeature: TECHNICIAN_DISPATCH
Sidebar hides Billing for basic-tier tenant
Sidebar hides Projects for basic-tier tenant
Sidebar hides Technician Dispatch for basic-tier tenant
Sidebar shows all items for pro-tier tenant
Sidebar shows all items for premium-tier tenant
Items without requiredFeature are always shown regardless of tier
/msp/billing shows UpsellPlaceholder for basic-tier tenant
/msp/billing shows normal content for pro-tier tenant
/msp/projects shows UpsellPlaceholder for basic-tier tenant
/msp/projects shows normal content for pro-tier tenant
/msp/technician-dispatch shows UpsellPlaceholder for basic-tier tenant
/msp/technician-dispatch shows normal content for pro-tier tenant
assertTierAccess throws TierAccessError for basic tenant accessing BILLING
assertTierAccess does not throw for pro tenant accessing BILLING
assertTierAccess throws for NULL plan tenant (misconfigured → basic access)
Billing server actions reject basic-tier tenant with TierAccessError
Project server actions reject basic-tier tenant with TierAccessError
Technician dispatch server actions reject basic-tier tenant with TierAccessError
Account page shows actual tier name instead of hardcoded 'Professional'
Account page displays tier badge
Account page shows tier comparison card with Basic/Pro/Premium features
E2E: Pro tenant sees all navigation items and can access all features
E2E: Basic tenant sees reduced navigation and upsell on gated pages
E2E: Changing plan in DB from pro to basic gates features after session refresh
E2E: Changing plan in DB from basic to pro restores features after session refresh
E2E: NULL plan shows warning banner and restricts to basic features
Phase C: EE self-registration creates tenant with plan='basic'
Phase C: CE self-registration still creates tenant with plan='pro'
